generated_note: No runtime prediction engine. Scenarios are discipline, not prophecy. Human review gates high-impact use.
external_context_note: Strategic foresight helps decision-makers work with uncertainty (e.g. UNDP foresight publications). AI risk management frameworks (e.g. NIST AI RMF) and trustworthy-AI principles (e.g. OECD) inform review posture — this hub does not call external APIs from this registry.

layers.name: Pre-Pattern Present-to-Future Analyzer
layers.purpose: Observe past patterns, read present signals, map possible futures, flag repeating civilizational mistakes, and recommend safer pathways as scenarios — not as certainty.
forbidden_without_charter: Automated future scoring from live user data
Public claims of civilization outcome certainty
Autonomous steering of deploy, billing, or entitlements
layers.safety_law: Past pattern ≠ future certainty. Scenario ≠ prophecy. Signal ≠ instruction.

layers.name: Multi-Supervisor Overseer AI
layers.purpose: Council-style review roles that inspect the same future-roadmap scenario from different lenses (ethics, safety, economics, ecology, education, law, accessibility, technology, human dignity) — advisory only; not human authority.
connected_layers: NIST AI RMF posture (doctrine reference only)
OECD trustworthy AI principles (doctrine reference only)
allowed_now: Define overseer role checklists in markdown
Map roles to existing governance docs
Synthetic persona labels in UI only where already allowed (e.g. legal workstation mentors)
forbidden_without_charter: Multi-agent runtime that issues binding decisions
Replacing human legal or safety sign-off
Automated policy changes from overseer consensus
layers.safety_law: AI overseer ≠ human authority. Council output is risk review material, not orders.

layers.name: Future Upcoming Migration Civilization Roadmaps
layers.purpose: Narrative and structured maps of how people, tech, services, education, work, health, AI, cities, and cultures might migrate between states over time — migration maps, not instructions or inevitability.
allowed_now: Cross-link to capability and entitlement registries
forbidden_without_charter: Entitlement changes implied by roadmap text alone
layers.safety_law: Roadmap ≠ permission. Migration story ≠ SKU or deploy clearance.

layers.name: Civilizational Foresight Doctrine (phase shell)
layers.purpose: Bundle Z-PPPFA, Z-MSOAI, and Z-FUMCR under one phase receipt and registry for ecosystem coherence — foresight, not prediction.
